scenarios: A completed teammate task is independently reviewed by a task-reviewer agent before the Phase 3 gate opens.
The PostToolUse(TaskUpdate) hook blocks evidence whose independent_review.reviewer equals the teammate.
The hook blocks evidence missing the independent_review block or with verdict != pass.
acceptance_criteria: agents/task-reviewer.md exists; model opus; tools are read-only on source (no Edit).
hooks/review_evidence_schema.py (schema v5) requires an independent_review block with reviewer, verdict, and the four review fields.
validate_evidence() rejects evidence when independent_review is absent, when reviewer == teammate, or when verdict != pass.
team-spawning-and-review-gates documents the task-reviewer dispatch and no longer states honesty is enforced by teammate discipline alone.
architect-team-pipeline Phase 3 spawns the task-reviewer and its verdict populates the gate.

scenarios: After the orchestrator's Phase 7 walk, an independent system-architect audit re-verifies the coverage map and the SRs.
The Phase 8 auto-commit is gated on the master-review audit verdict overall: pass.
The Stop hook blocks a run that produced coverage-map progress but no passing master-review audit.
acceptance_criteria: agents/system-architect.md documents a Master Review Audit mode.
architect-team-pipeline Phase 7 dispatches the independent audit; Phase 8 commit is gated on overall: pass.
hooks/pipeline-completion-audit.py checks the master-review audit verdict when a run produced one.
